units.name: var-data-containers-setup.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Create /var/data/containers directory
After=var-data.mount
Requires=var-data.mount
Before=var-lib-containers.mount

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/data/containers

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: var-lib-containers.mount
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Container storage on local disk
After=var-data-containers-setup.service
Requires=var-data-containers-setup.service

[Mount]
What=/var/data/containers
Where=/var/lib/containers
Type=none
Options=bind

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: mkube-agent.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=mkube batch runner agent
After=network-online.target var-data.mount
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=var-data.mount

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
EnvironmentFile=/etc/mkube-agent.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/mkube-agent
WorkingDirectory=/var/data
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
